events.title: Claude deployed via Palantir AIP for U.S. defense and intelligence
events.description: Anthropic, Palantir and AWS announce a partnership bringing Claude 3 and 3.5 models into Palantir's AIP on IL6-accredited AWS infrastructure for U.S. intelligence and defense operations.

events.title: Palantir first partner to bring Claude to classified environments
events.description: Palantir announces it is the first industry partner to bring Claude models to classified U.S. government environments, marking a milestone in defense AI deployment.

events.title: Tech giants team up to sell Claude to defense customers
events.description: TechCrunch reports Anthropic joined Palantir and AWS to sell Claude to defense customers, a notable shift for a safety-focused AI lab.

events.title: Anthropic and NNSA red-team Claude for nuclear proliferation risk
events.description: Anthropic partners with the Department of Energy's NNSA to red-team Claude in a secure environment, assessing whether the model might disclose sensitive nuclear information.

events.title: Claude on Amazon Bedrock approved for FedRAMP High and DoD IL4/5
events.description: Anthropic's Claude models become the first foundation models approved for FedRAMP High and DoD Impact Level 4/5 workloads in Amazon Bedrock's AWS GovCloud regions.

events.title: Anthropic launches Claude Gov models for U.S. national security
events.description: Anthropic unveils a custom 'Claude Gov' family built exclusively for U.S. national security customers, already deployed in classified environments.

events.title: Pentagon CDAO awards Anthropic $200M frontier AI agreement
events.description: The DoD Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office awards Anthropic a two-year prototype other transaction agreement with a $200M ceiling to develop frontier AI for national security missions.

events.title: CDAO splits $600M among Anthropic, Google, and xAI for agentic AI
events.description: Breaking Defense reports the Pentagon's CDAO awarding $200M each to Anthropic, Google, and xAI to build agentic AI workflows across DoD mission areas.

events.title: Lawrence Livermore expands Claude for Enterprise lab-wide
events.description: LLNL scales Claude for Enterprise to roughly 10,000 scientists and staff, supporting nuclear deterrence, energy, and materials science research.

events.title: GSA strikes OneGov deal delivering Claude to government for $1
events.description: GSA announces an OneGov agreement offering Claude for Enterprise and Claude for Government to all three branches of the U.S. government for a nominal $1 fee.

events.title: Claude for Government added to Carahsoft GSA schedule
events.description: Anthropic expands federal access to Claude through reseller Carahsoft's Federal Supply Schedule, enabling rapid procurement across executive, legislative, and judicial branches.

events.title: Anthropic and NNSA co-develop nuclear risk classifier
events.description: Anthropic and the NNSA release a co-developed classifier that detects concerning nuclear-weapon queries in Claude traffic with 96% accuracy.

events.title: Claude on Google Cloud Vertex AI authorized for FedRAMP High and IL2
events.description: Claude on Google Cloud Vertex AI achieves FedRAMP High and DoD IL2 authorization, opening broader federal agency and defense organization access.

events.title: Anthropic joins DOE Genesis Mission across 17 national labs
events.description: Anthropic announces a multi-year partnership supporting the DOE Genesis Mission, giving researchers across all 17 national labs access to Claude and purpose-built scientific tools.

events.title: DOE signs Genesis Mission collaboration with 24 organizations
events.description: The Department of Energy announces Genesis Mission collaboration agreements with 24 organizations including Anthropic to accelerate AI-driven scientific discovery.

events.title: Pentagon designates Anthropic a supply chain risk
events.description: The DoD officially designates Anthropic a supply chain risk after the company refuses to drop restrictions on autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance.

events.title: Anthropic sues Pentagon over supply chain risk label
events.description: Anthropic files suit against the Trump administration and Pentagon, challenging the unprecedented supply-chain-risk designation applied to an American AI company.

events.title: Palantir CEO confirms continued Claude use despite DoD blacklist
events.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp says Palantir's products remain integrated with Anthropic's Claude even as the Pentagon phases Anthropic out of defense workflows.

events.title: CrowdStrike joins Project Glasswing as founding member
events.description: CrowdStrike announces its role as a founding member of Anthropic's Project Glasswing, using Claude Mythos Preview to secure AI runtimes and critical infrastructure.

events.title: Microsoft joins Project Glasswing via Microsoft Foundry
events.description: Microsoft MSRC announces joining Project Glasswing and enabling Claude Mythos Preview research access via Microsoft Foundry to identify and mitigate software risk.

events.title: Linux Foundation partners on Project Glasswing for open source
events.description: The Linux Foundation joins Project Glasswing with Anthropic donating $2.5M to Alpha-Omega and OpenSSF to help maintainers use Claude Mythos Preview to secure open source code.

events.title: JPMorgan Chase joins Glasswing coalition for financial cyber defense
events.description: JPMorgan Chase is named a launch partner in Project Glasswing, using Claude Mythos Preview for defensive cybersecurity across critical financial infrastructure.

events.title: AWS joins Project Glasswing to secure critical software
events.description: Amazon Web Services signs on as a Project Glasswing launch partner, committing to use Claude Mythos Preview for defensive security work on critical software infrastructure.

events.title: Google joins Project Glasswing cybersecurity coalition
events.description: Google joins Anthropic's Project Glasswing as a launch partner to apply Claude Mythos Preview toward defending critical software systems from AI-powered attacks.

events.title: Anthropic loses appeals bid to block Pentagon blacklisting
events.description: A federal appeals court in Washington denies Anthropic's request to temporarily block the DoD supply chain risk designation while the lawsuit continues.
